disguise-self::vision_light_sound.issue: Disguise Self can change apparent height by up to 1 foot and apparent weight, but these appearance constraints are only prose in a generic utility effect.

disguise-self::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime disguiseAppearance data instead of relying on description text.

disguise-self::illusion_or_disguise.issue: Disguise Self has physical-inspection failure and Study action Intelligence (Investigation) reveal rules, but these reveal mechanics are only prose.

disguise-self::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'until the spell ends' is ordinary duration scoping, not a special early-ending mechanic.
disguise-self::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional-ending field needed beyond the one-hour duration.
disguise-self::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime conditional-ending field needed beyond duration.

dissonant-whispers::choice_or_mode.issue: The phrase 'creature of your choice' is ordinary single-target selection.

dissonant-whispers::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change needed for the save-gated damage and movement.

dissonant-whispers::reaction_or_opportun.issue: Dissonant Whispers represents reaction-using forced movement away from the caster, but 'if available' and 'safest route' are only stored in prose/custom formula.

dissonant-whispers::reaction_or_opportun.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime forcedMovement routeConstraint=safest_route and reactionRequiredIfAvailable data.

dissonant-whispers::vision_light_sound.issue: The discordant melody in the target's mind is presentation for the psychic damage and forced movement; it does not create an audible area sound mechanic.

dissonant-whispers::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime light/sound field needed for this descriptive wording.

divine-favor::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Divine Favor's extra 1d4 Radiant damage on weapon attack hits is represented as an on_attack_hit weapon DAMAGE rider.

divine-favor::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'until the spell ends' is ordinary duration scoping, not a special early-ending mechanic.

divine-smite::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by correcting the secondary damage target filter from creatureType to creatureTypes.

divine-smite::conditional_ending.issue: The Fiend/Undead clause is a conditional damage bonus, not an ending condition, and the secondary damage effect now filters those creature types.
divine-smite::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Track through conditional damage fields rather than conditional ending.

ensnaring-strike::attack_or_save_modifie.issue: Ensnaring Strike's Strength save and Large-or-larger advantage are represented; the save modifier key was corrected to use sizes.

ensnaring-strike::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by correcting the save modifier appliesTo key from size to sizes.

ensnaring-strike::repeat_save_or_recurri.issue: Recurring start-of-turn piercing damage while Restrained and action-based escape checks are represented in runtime damage/status data.
ensnaring-strike::repeat_save_or_recurri.recommendedTemplateChange: No recurring-check field change needed for this reviewed row.
ensnaring-strike::repeat_save_or_recurri.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change needed for the existing turn_start damage and escape check data.

ensnaring-strike::status_or_state_change.issue: The Restrained condition is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION with a Strength save gate and escape check.

ensnaring-strike::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime environmental field needed for this descriptive vine wording in this goal.

ensnaring-strike::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change needed for the represented save/escape ending behavior.

entangle::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target exclusion for caster on the Restrained save application.

entangle::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Plants disappearing when the spell ends is cleanup, not aftermath, awareness, or memory.

expeditious-retreat::attack_or_save_modi.issue: The detector matched the word 'action', but Expeditious Retreat does not modify attack rolls, saves, or checks.

expeditious-retreat::sustain_or_recast_a.issue: Expeditious Retreat immediately grants Dash and then grants Dash again as a Bonus Action until the spell ends, but runtime JSON keeps this in a generic utility description with grantedActions empty.

expeditious-retreat::sustain_or_recast_a.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime grantedActions data for immediate Dash and bonus-action Dash.

expeditious-retreat::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime conditional-ending field needed beyond duration/concentration.

faerie-fire::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime light data now records caster_choice and the available outline colors.

faerie-fire::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Faerie Fire grants Advantage on attacks against affected creatures or objects if the attacker can see the target, but runtime JSON only stores this in description text.

faerie-fire::vision_light_sound.issue: Faerie Fire's 10-foot Dim Light rider and caster-chosen outline color are now represented by light radius/color fields; attack Advantage remains open under attack_or_save_modifier.

faerie-fire::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime utility light data now carries dimRadius 10, brightRadius 0, attachedTo target, and caster_choice color.

cure-wounds::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change needed for the represented healing amount and scaling.

false-life::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change needed for the represented temporary HP and slot scaling.

find-familiar::choice_or_mode.issue: Find Familiar requires choosing a familiar form and creature type, and recasting changes the existing familiar's eligible form instead of creating another familiar.
find-familiar::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon choice fields for form choice, creature type choice, and recast form replacement.
find-familiar::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon choice data for eligible forms, Celestial/Fey/Fiend type selection, and one-familiar recast replacement.

find-familiar::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched special senses, but Find Familiar does not directly modify an attack roll or saving throw.
find-familiar::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Track shared senses under sensor/remote perception instead of attack/save modifier fields.
find-familiar::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Track shared senses under summon/sensor data instead of attack/save modifier data.

find-familiar::reaction_or_opportunity_r.issue: A familiar can deliver a touch spell only by taking its Reaction while within 100 feet, but this is only partly represented as a named special action.
find-familiar::reaction_or_opportunity_r.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reaction delivery fields for touch spell delivery, familiar distance limit, and reaction consumption.
find-familiar::reaction_or_opportunity_r.recommendedJsonChange: Add structured touchSpellDelivery data instead of relying on specialActions description text.

find-familiar::target_filter_or_eligibil.issue: The familiar appears and reappears only in unoccupied spaces, eligible forms are Beast CR 0 forms, and one familiar is allowed at a time.
find-familiar::target_filter_or_eligibil.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon placement and eligibility fields for unoccupied space, CR 0 Beast form eligibility, and one-active-familiar limit.
find-familiar::target_filter_or_eligibil.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon placement constraints, eligible form filters, and active-instance limit.

find-familiar::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: Find Familiar uses a Bonus Action for shared senses, Magic actions for dismiss/reappear, and recasting changes the familiar's form.
find-familiar::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Add follow-up action fields for shared senses, temporary dismissal, reappearance, permanent dismissal, and recast reshaping.
find-familiar::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed one narrow mismatch by changing sharedSensesCost to bonus_action; add runtime follow-up action data for dismiss/reappear/recast behavior.

find-familiar::vision_light_sound.issue: Shared senses let the caster see and hear through the familiar and gain any special senses until the start of the caster's next turn.
find-familiar::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensory sharing fields for sight, hearing, special senses, duration, range, and action cost.
find-familiar::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Extend sharedSenses data beyond a boolean so the runtime knows the senses, bonus-action cost, 100-foot limit, and until-start-next-turn duration.

find-familiar::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The detector matched the familiar's disappearance/reappearance wording, but the spell does not create an illusion or disguise.
find-familiar::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Track disappearance and pocket-dimension behavior under summon/conditional-ending fields.
find-familiar::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedJsonChange: Track disappearance and pocket-dimension behavior under summon/conditional-ending runtime data.

find-familiar::sensor_or_remote_percepti.issue: The caster can remotely see and hear through the familiar and gains its special senses, but the runtime only stores sharedSenses as a coarse boolean.

find-familiar::sensor_or_remote_percepti.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime shared-sense details instead of a boolean-only sharedSenses flag.

find-familiar::message_or_communication.issue: Find Familiar grants telepathic communication with the familiar within 100 feet, but telepathy is only a summon subfield and not connected to communication mechanics.
find-familiar::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication fields for telepathic link target and range.
find-familiar::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication/telepathy data or standardize summon telepathy fields across the template.

find-familiar::summon_or_controlled_enti.issue: The summon is represented, but independent initiative, ally status, no-attack restriction, allowed normal actions, chosen-form statistics, disappearance at 0 HP, item drop, pocket dimension, and active-instance limit are not first-class data.
find-familiar::summon_or_controlled_enti.recommendedTemplateChange: Extend summon fields for initiative, ally relationship, prohibited attacks, allowed actions, form statistics, 0-HP disappearance, item drop behavior, dismissal modes, and one-active-instance limit.
find-familiar::summon_or_controlled_enti.recommendedJsonChange: Extend runtime summon data beyond formOptions/sharedSenses/specialActions to encode the familiar's combat and lifecycle rules.

find-familiar::social_or_knowledge_effec.issue: The familiar is explicitly an ally to the caster and the caster's allies, but ally relationship is not represented as runtime relationship data.

find-familiar::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime relationship data for familiar ally status.

find-familiar::object_stats_or_damageabi.issue: The familiar uses the chosen form's statistics, disappears at 0 Hit Points, and leaves worn or carried objects behind when it disappears.

find-familiar::object_stats_or_damageabi.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime stat source and disappearance/drop behavior for the familiar.

fog-cloud::environmental_change.issue: Fog Cloud's fog sphere, strong-wind dispersal, and slot scaling are represented, but the Heavily Obscured visibility state is still flattened into terrainType obscuring.
fog-cloud::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add explicit obscurity-level fields for terrain/environmental effects.
fog-cloud::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime obscurityLevel: heavily_obscured or equivalent instead of relying only on terrainType obscuring.

goodberry::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched Bonus Action wording, but Goodberry does not alter attack rolls or saving throws.
goodberry::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Track berry eating under resource/consumption and healing fields.
goodberry::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Track berry eating under consumable object and healing data.

goodberry::resource_or_consumption.issue: Goodberry creates ten consumable berries; each can be eaten as a Bonus Action and provides nourishment for one day, but runtime JSON stores only a creation description.
goodberry::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Add consumable-created-resource fields for count, consume action, per-item use, nourishment duration, and remaining-item cleanup.
goodberry::resource_or_consumption.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime consumableResource data for ten berries, bonus-action eating, one berry per use, and one-day nourishment.

goodberry::healing_or_restoration.issue: Each Goodberry restores 1 Hit Point when eaten, but the runtime JSON has no healing effect tied to berry consumption.
goodberry::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add consumable healing fields for fixed HP restoration triggered by eating a created item.
goodberry::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime healing data for each berry restoring 1 HP on bonus-action consumption.

goodberry::conditional_ending.closedReason: The uneaten-berries disappearance is normal duration cleanup at the 24-hour spell end, not a special early-ending trigger. Goodberry's created berries, healing, nourishment, and cleanup data remain open under resource/healing created-consumable buckets.
goodberry::conditional_ending.issue: Uneaten berries disappear when the spell ends, but created-item cleanup is only prose.

goodberry::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cleanup data for uneaten berries disappearing at duration end.

goodberry::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The detector matched spell-end disappearance, but Goodberry has no aftermath, awareness, or memory mechanic.

goodberry::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: Track uneaten berry disappearance under consumable resource cleanup.

hail-of-thorns::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Hail of Thorns' Dexterity save for both the attack target and nearby creatures is now represented in runtime JSON.

hail-of-thorns::environmental_change.issue: The rain of thorns sprouting from the weapon or ammunition is descriptive presentation for the save-gated piercing damage, not a persistent environmental change.

hail-of-thorns::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: No environmental runtime field needed for this descriptive visual wording in this goal.
